sentences.sentence: By the year 2050, nearly 80% of the Earth's population will live in urban centres.
sentences.translation: 到2050年，全球将有近80%的人口居住在城市中心。
difficult_points: By the year 2050 表示“到2050年时”，与一般将来时 will live 搭配。
nearly 80% of the Earth's population 是完整主语，核心是表示比例的 80%。

sentences.sentence: Applying the most conservative estimates to current demographic trends, the human population will increase by about three billion people by then.
sentences.translation: 即使把最保守的估算应用于当前的人口趋势，到那时全球人口也将增加约三十亿。

structure.text: Applying the most conservative estimates to current demographic trends

difficult_points: Applying ... trends 是现在分词短语，表示进行人口预测时采用的估算方法。
increase by 表示增加的幅度，而不是增加到某个总数。
by then 指代“到2050年时”。

sentences.sentence: An estimated 109 hectares of new land (about 20% larger than Brazil) will be needed to grow enough food to feed them, if traditional farming methods continue as they are practised today.
sentences.translation: 如果传统耕作方式继续沿用今天的做法，预计将需要约十亿公顷的新土地（面积比巴西大约20%），才能种出足够的粮食养活这些人。

structure.text: An estimated 109 hectares of new land (about 20% larger than Brazil)
if traditional farming methods continue as they are practised today

difficult_points: An estimated 109 hectares of new land 是被动句的主语，estimated 表示这一数字为估算值。
两个不定式依次说明“需要土地”的目的和“种植粮食”的目的。
if 引导条件状语从句，其中 they 指代 traditional farming methods。
as they are practised today 表示“按照今天实行的方式”，含被动语态。

sentences.sentence: At present, throughout the world, over 80% of the land that is suitable for raising crops is in use.
sentences.translation: 目前在全世界，适合种植作物的土地已有80%以上正在使用。

structure.text: that is suitable for raising crops

difficult_points: that 引导限制性定语从句，限定 land 的范围为适合种植作物的土地。
be suitable for 后接动名词 raising，表示“适合用于种植”。
in use 是介词短语作表语，意为“正在使用中”。

sentences.sentence: Historically, some 15% of that has been laid waste by poor management practices.
sentences.translation: 从历史上看，其中约15%的土地因管理不善而遭到荒废。
difficult_points: that 指代上一句中适合种植作物的土地。
some 用在数字前表示“大约”，并非“某些”的意思。
has been laid waste 是现在完成时的被动结构，表示土地已遭荒废。

sentences.sentence: What can be done to ensure enough food for the world's population to live on?
sentences.translation: 怎样才能确保有足够的粮食供世界人口维持生活呢？

structure.text: for the world's population to live on

difficult_points: What 在被动疑问句中充当主语，询问“可以采取什么措施”。
to ensure ... 是目的状语，说明采取措施的目标。
for the world's population to live on 是“for＋名词＋不定式”结构，修饰 enough food。

sentences.sentence: The concept of indoor farming is not new, since hothouse production of tomatoes and other produce has been in vogue for some time.
sentences.translation: 室内农业的概念并不新鲜，因为利用温室生产番茄和其他农产品已经流行了一段时间。

structure.text: since hothouse production of tomatoes and other produce has been in vogue for some time
hothouse production of tomatoes and other produce

difficult_points: since 在这里引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”，不是表示时间起点。
has been in vogue 是现在完成时，说明这种生产方式流行已有一段时间。
produce 在此是不可数名词，指农产品。

sentences.sentence: What is new is the urgent need to scale up this technology to accommodate another three billion people.
sentences.translation: 真正的新问题，是迫切需要扩大这项技术的应用规模，以满足另外三十亿人的需求。

structure.text: the urgent need to scale up this technology
to accommodate another three billion people

difficult_points: What is new 是 what 引导的名词性从句，在句中作主语。
need 后的不定式 to scale up ... 具体说明迫切需要做什么。
第二个不定式表示扩大技术规模的目的，即容纳新增人口的粮食需求。

sentences.sentence: Many believe an entirely new approach to indoor farming is required, employing cutting-edge technologies.
sentences.translation: 许多人认为，室内农业需要一种全新的方法，并采用尖端技术。

structure.text: an entirely new approach to indoor farming is required
an entirely new approach to indoor farming

difficult_points: believe 后省略了连接词 that，其后的完整句子作宾语从句。
is required 是被动结构，表示“是必需的”。
employing ... 是现在分词短语，补充说明新方法将采用的技术。

sentences.sentence: One such proposal is for the 'Vertical Farm'.
sentences.translation: 其中一个这样的方案就是建设“垂直农场”。
difficult_points: such 回指上一句所说的采用尖端技术的新型室内农业方法。
for the 'Vertical Farm' 说明该方案所主张建设的项目。

sentences.sentence: The concept is of multi-storey buildings in which food crops are grown in environmentally controlled conditions.
sentences.translation: 这一构想是建造多层建筑，在其中以环境受控的条件种植粮食作物。

structure.text: in which food crops are grown in environmentally controlled conditions

difficult_points: in which 引导定语从句，which 指代 multi-storey buildings。
are grown 是被动语态，说明作物是在建筑内由人种植的。
environmentally controlled 是过去分词短语作定语，表示环境条件受到人为控制。

sentences.sentence: Situated in the heart of urban centres, they would drastically reduce the amount of transportation required to bring food to consumers.
sentences.translation: 由于坐落在城市中心地带，这些农场会大幅减少把食物运送给消费者所需的运输量。

structure.text: Situated in the heart of urban centres
required to bring food to consumers

difficult_points: Situated ... 是过去分词短语，逻辑主语是 they，即垂直农场。
they 回指上一句中的 multi-storey buildings，也就是垂直农场。
required ... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 transportation。
would 表示在这一设想实现的情况下预计会产生的结果。

expressions.meaning_zh: 把食物送到消费者手中

sentences.sentence: Vertical farms would need to be efficient, cheap to construct and safe to operate.
sentences.translation: 垂直农场必须高效、建造成本低廉且操作安全。

structure.text: efficient, cheap to construct and safe to operate

difficult_points: 三个并列形容词 efficient、cheap 和 safe 共同作表语。
cheap to construct 和 safe to operate 均是“形容词＋不定式”结构。
不定式中的逻辑宾语都是句子主语 Vertical farms。

sentences.sentence: If successfully implemented, proponents claim, vertical farms offer the promise of urban renewal, sustainable production of a safe and varied food supply (through year-round production of all crops), and the eventual repair of ecosystems that have been sacrificed for horizontal farming.
sentences.translation: 支持者声称，如果成功实施，垂直农场有望促进城市复兴，持续生产安全而多样的食物（通过全年种植各种作物），并最终修复那些为平面农业而被牺牲的生态系统。

structure.text: the promise of urban renewal, sustainable production of a safe and varied food supply (through year-round production of all crops), and the eventual repair of ecosystems
through year-round production of all crops
that have been sacrificed for horizontal farming

difficult_points: If successfully implemented 是省略结构，完整形式为 if vertical farms are successfully implemented。
proponents claim 是插入的转述成分，句子主干是 vertical farms offer the promise of ...。
of 后连接三个并列名词成分：urban renewal、sustainable production 和 eventual repair。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 ecosystems，其中 have been sacrificed 是现在完成时的被动结构。

sentences.sentence: It took humans 10,000 years to learn how to grow most of the crops we now take for granted.
sentences.translation: 人类用了整整一万年，才学会如何种植如今被我们视为理所当然的大多数作物。

structure.text: how to grow most of the crops

difficult_points: It took humans 10,000 years to ... 使用形式主语结构，真正的内容由不定式表达。
how to grow ... 是“疑问词＋不定式”结构，作 learn 的宾语。
we now take for granted 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 crops。
take ... for granted 表示把某事物视为理所当然。

sentences.sentence: Along the way we despoiled most of the land we worked, often turning verdant, natural ecozones into semi-arid deserts.
sentences.translation: 在这一过程中，我们破坏了大部分耕作过的土地，常常把青翠的自然生态区变成半干旱的荒漠。

structure.text: often turning verdant, natural ecozones into semi-arid deserts

difficult_points: we worked 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 land，worked 在此表示“耕作”。
turning ... into ... 是现在分词短语，说明破坏土地所造成的结果。
turn A into B 表示“把A变成B”。

sentences.sentence: Within that same time frame, we evolved into an urban species, in which 60% of the human population now lives vertically in cities.
sentences.translation: 在同一时期内，我们演变成了一个城市物种，如今60%的人口都在城市的高层建筑中垂直生活。

structure.text: in which 60% of the human population now lives vertically in cities

difficult_points: that same time frame 指前一句提到的人类学习种植作物的一万年。
in which 引导非限制性定语从句，对 an urban species 作进一步说明。
lives vertically 并非单指“直立生活”，而是形象地指居住在城市多层建筑中。

sentences.sentence: This means that, for the majority, we humans have shelter from the elements, yet we subject our food-bearing plants to the rigours of the great outdoors and can do no more than hope for a good weather year.
sentences.translation: 这意味着，对大多数人而言，我们人类可以躲避恶劣天气，却让承载食物的植物经受户外环境的严酷考验，而自己只能盼望某一年风调雨顺。

structure.text: that, for the majority, we humans have shelter from the elements, yet we subject our food-bearing plants to the rigours of the great outdoors and can do no more than hope for a good weather year
we humans have shelter from the elements
yet we subject our food-bearing plants to the rigours of the great outdoors
can do no more than hope for a good weather year

difficult_points: that 引导 means 的宾语从句，从句内部由 yet 连接两层对比。
This 指代上一句所述的人类已成为居住在城市中的物种这一事实。
subject A to B 表示“使A经受B”，此处人与作物的处境形成反差。
can do no more than 表示“除了……什么也做不了”。

sentences.sentence: However, more often than not now, due to a rapidly changing climate that is not what happens.
sentences.translation: 然而如今，由于气候正在迅速变化，实际情况往往并非如此。

structure.text: due to a rapidly changing climate

difficult_points: that 指代上一句末尾所说的“出现天气良好的一年”。
what happens 是 what 引导的表语从句，表示“实际发生的情况”。
more often than not 是固定表达，意为“往往、通常”。

sentences.sentence: Massive floods, long droughts, hurricanes and severe monsoons take their toll each year, destroying millions of tons of valuable crops.
sentences.translation: 大规模洪水、长期干旱、飓风和严重的季风灾害每年都造成损失，毁掉数百万吨宝贵的农作物。

structure.text: Massive floods, long droughts, hurricanes and severe monsoons
destroying millions of tons of valuable crops

difficult_points: 四类极端天气构成并列主语，共同支配谓语 take。
take their toll 是固定表达，表示造成严重损失。
destroying ... 是现在分词短语，说明这些灾害造成的具体结果。

sentences.sentence: The supporters of vertical farming claim many potential advantages for the system.
sentences.translation: 垂直农业的支持者声称，这一系统具有许多潜在优势。

structure.text: many potential advantages for the system

difficult_points: of vertical farming 修饰 supporters，指支持垂直农业的人。
for the system 修饰 advantages，说明这些潜在优势归属于该系统。

sentences.sentence: For instance, crops would be produced all year round, as they would be kept in artificially controlled, optimum growing conditions.
sentences.translation: 例如，作物可以全年生产，因为它们会被置于人工控制的最佳生长条件中。

structure.text: as they would be kept in artificially controlled, optimum growing conditions
in artificially controlled, optimum growing conditions

difficult_points: 两个 would be 都表示假设垂直农场建成后可能出现的情况，并采用被动语态。
as 在这里引导原因状语从句，意为“因为”。
they 指代主句中的 crops。

sentences.sentence: There would be no weather-related crop failures due to droughts, floods or pests.
sentences.translation: 不会再有因干旱、洪水或虫害造成的天气相关作物歉收。

structure.text: due to droughts, floods or pests

difficult_points: There would be 是存在句，真正的信息中心是 no weather-related crop failures。
weather-related 是复合形容词，表示“与天气有关的”。
due to 引出作物歉收的原因。

sentences.sentence: All the food could be grown organically, eliminating the need for herbicides, pesticides and fertilisers.
sentences.translation: 所有食物都可以采用有机方式种植，从而不再需要除草剂、杀虫剂和肥料。

structure.text: eliminating the need for herbicides, pesticides and fertilisers

difficult_points: could be grown 是情态动词加被动语态，表示设想中的可能性。
eliminating ... 是现在分词短语，表示有机种植所带来的结果。
the need for 后接三项并列的农业投入品。

sentences.sentence: The system would greatly reduce the incidence of many infectious diseases that are acquired at the agricultural interface.
sentences.translation: 该系统会大幅降低许多在农业接触环节感染的传染病的发生率。

structure.text: the incidence of many infectious diseases
that are acquired at the agricultural interface

difficult_points: the incidence of 指疾病的发生率，而不是疾病本身的严重程度。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 infectious diseases。
are acquired 是被动语态，表示疾病在农业生产的人畜或环境接触环节被感染。

sentences.sentence: Although the system would consume energy, it would return energy to the grid via methane generation from composting non-edible parts of plants.
sentences.translation: 尽管该系统会消耗能源，但它可以通过堆肥处理植物不可食用的部分来产生甲烷，从而把能源输回电网。

structure.text: Although the system would consume energy
via methane generation from composting non-edible parts of plants

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，将耗能与回馈能源两方面形成对照。
it 指代 the system。
via 表示实现回馈能源的途径，from composting ... 进一步说明甲烷的来源。
composting 是动名词，表示把植物不可食用部分制成堆肥。

sentences.sentence: It would also dramatically reduce fossil fuel use, by cutting out the need for tractors, ploughs and shipping.
sentences.translation: 此外，由于不再需要拖拉机、犁具和运输，该系统还会大幅减少化石燃料的使用。

structure.text: by cutting out the need for tractors, ploughs and shipping

difficult_points: It 回指垂直农业系统。
by 后接动名词 cutting，表示减少化石燃料使用的方式。
cut out the need for 表示彻底免除对某物的需要。

sentences.sentence: A major drawback of vertical farming, however, is that the plants would require artificial light.
sentences.translation: 然而，垂直农业的一大缺点是植物需要人工照明。

structure.text: A major drawback of vertical farming
that the plants would require artificial light

difficult_points: however 是插入的连接副词，承接上一段优势并转向缺点。
that 引导表语从句，具体说明 major drawback 的内容。
would require 表示在垂直农场设想中植物将会有这种需求。

sentences.sentence: Without it, those plants nearest the windows would be exposed to more sunlight and grow more quickly, reducing the efficiency of the system.
sentences.translation: 如果没有人工照明，最靠近窗户的植物会获得更多阳光、长得更快，从而降低整个系统的效率。

structure.text: would be exposed to more sunlight
reducing the efficiency of the system

difficult_points: it 指代上一句的 artificial light。
nearest the windows 是形容词短语，后置修饰 those plants。
would be exposed 和 grow 是两个并列谓语，后者与 would 共用。
reducing ... 是现在分词短语，表示光照不均所导致的结果。

sentences.sentence: Single-storey greenhouses have the benefit of natural overhead light: even so, many still need artificial lighting.
sentences.translation: 单层温室具有天然顶部采光的优势；即便如此，许多温室仍然需要人工照明。

structure.text: the benefit of natural overhead light

difficult_points: 冒号连接两个完整分句，后一句进一步指出即使单层温室也需要人工照明。
even so 是连接副词，表示“即便如此”，不是从句。
many 省略了前文已经出现的 single-storey greenhouses。

sentences.sentence: A multi-storey facility with no natural overhead light would require far more.
sentences.translation: 而没有天然顶部采光的多层设施所需的人工照明会多得多。

structure.text: A multi-storey facility with no natural overhead light

difficult_points: with no natural overhead light 是介词短语，后置修饰 facility。
far more 中省略了上句的 artificial lighting。
far 修饰比较级 more，强调数量多出很多。

sentences.sentence: Generating enough light could be prohibitively expensive, unless cheap, renewable energy is available, and this appears to be rather a future aspiration than a likelihood for the near future.
sentences.translation: 产生足够的光照可能会昂贵到难以承受，除非能够获得廉价的可再生能源；而这与其说是近期可能实现的事情，不如说是未来的愿景。

structure.text: unless cheap, renewable energy is available
rather a future aspiration than a likelihood for the near future

difficult_points: Generating enough light 是动名词短语作主语。
unless 引导条件状语从句，相当于 if cheap, renewable energy is not available 的反向条件。
this 指代廉价可再生能源能够广泛供应这一设想。
rather A than B 表示“与其说是B，不如说是A”。

sentences.sentence: One variation on vertical farming that has been developed is to grow plants in stacked trays that move on rails.
sentences.translation: 已经开发出的一种垂直农业变体，是把植物种在沿轨道移动的层叠托盘中。

structure.text: to grow plants in stacked trays

difficult_points: 第一个 that 引导定语从句，修饰 variation，has been developed 是现在完成时的被动结构。
不定式 to grow ... 作表语，具体说明这种变体是什么。
第二个 that 引导定语从句，修饰 stacked trays，而不是 plants。

sentences.sentence: Moving the trays allows the plants to get enough sunlight.
sentences.translation: 移动这些托盘能让植物获得充足的阳光。
difficult_points: Moving the trays 是动名词短语作主语，表示“移动托盘这一做法”。
allow A to do B 表示“使A能够做B”，不定式作宾语补足语。

sentences.sentence: This system is already in operation, and works well within a single-storey greenhouse with light reaching it from above: it is not certain, however, that it can be made to work without that overhead natural light.
sentences.translation: 该系统已经投入运行，并且在有光线从上方照入的单层温室中运作良好；然而，尚不确定能否在没有这种顶部自然光的情况下使它正常工作。

structure.text: works well within a single-storey greenhouse
with light reaching it from above
that it can be made to work without that overhead natural light

difficult_points: is already in operation 和 works well 是由 and 连接、共用主语 This system 的两个谓语。
with light reaching it from above 是“with＋名词＋现在分词”结构，说明温室的采光条件。
冒号后的 it 是形式主语，真正的主语是 that 引导的从句。
can be made to work 是使役结构的被动形式，表示“能否被设法使其运转”。

sentences.sentence: Vertical farming is an attempt to address the undoubted problems that we face in producing enough food for a growing population.
sentences.translation: 垂直农业是为了解决一个毋庸置疑的难题而作出的尝试：如何为不断增长的人口生产足够的食物。

structure.text: an attempt to address the undoubted problems
that we face in producing enough food for a growing population

difficult_points: to address ... 是不定式作后置定语，说明 attempt 的具体目标。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 problems，并在从句中作 face 的宾语。
face problems in doing 表示“在做某事时面临问题”。

sentences.sentence: At the moment, though, more needs to be done to reduce the detrimental impact it would have on the environment, particularly as regards the use of energy.
sentences.translation: 不过目前还需要做更多工作，以减少垂直农业可能对环境造成的不利影响，尤其是在能源使用方面。

structure.text: it would have on the environment
particularly as regards the use of energy

difficult_points: more 在这里名词化，指“更多工作或措施”，并与被动结构 needs to be done 搭配。
it would have on the environment 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 impact。
it 指代 vertical farming。
as regards 是固定介词表达，表示“关于、在……方面”。

sentences.sentence: While it is possible that much of our food will be grown in skyscrapers in future, most experts currently believe it is far more likely that we will simply use the space available on urban rooftops.
sentences.translation: 尽管未来我们的大量食物有可能会在摩天大楼里种植，但目前大多数专家认为，更有可能的做法只是利用城市屋顶上的可用空间。

structure.text: While it is possible that much of our food will be grown in skyscrapers in future
that much of our food will be grown in skyscrapers in future
that we will simply use the space available on urban rooftops

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，表示“尽管”，与主句中专家认为更可能的方案形成对比。
从句中的 it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
believe 后省略了连接词 that，其宾语从句又采用形式主语 it。
available on urban rooftops 是形容词短语，后置修饰 space。
